_source: Harris, S.J., Massimino, D., Balmer, D.E., Eaton, M.A., Noble, D.G., Pearce-Higgins, J.W., Woodcock, P. & Gillings, S. (2020). The Breeding Bird Survey 2019. BTO Research Report 732. BTO, Thetford.
_metric: Percentage change in regional index since 1995 (BBS smoothed index)
_note: Values are approximate % change from 1995 baseline derived from Table A12 and regional trend figures in Harris et al. 2020. These are static preregistered values — do not modify.
